stemHtml: Which one of the following statements concerning the formation of aircraft icing is most correct?

options.a: Greatest risk of icing conditions is experienced in cirrus clouds.
options.b: A cloud consisting of both supercooled water droplets and ice crystals produces aircraft icing.
options.c: Greatest risk of icing when cloud temperature decreases well below minus 12 degrees C.
options.d: Probability of icing increases when dry snow starts to fall from a cloud.
